drugs.name: cibenzoline
drugs.citation:
Niwa et al.,Drug Metab. Disp.,28,1128,2000
Zhou, S-F.; (2016); Cytochrome P450 2D6: Structure, Function, Regulation and Polymorphism; Edited by CRC Press; ISBN 9781466597884 - CAT# KE23693
broad_region_annotations:
<19,H;Hydroxylation> and <20,H;Hydroxylation> for CYP3A4 and 2D6 are reported in Yannick's sheet but not in the paper from Xenosite. 
<19,H;Hydroxylation> and <20,H;Hydroxylation> are reported as BoMs in Xenosite's dataset but can't be indentified in its reference. 
The reaction type is <17,18;Dehydrogenation>.
